mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE, STATUS, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ROLE_USER', '정상', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE, STATUS, LAWYER_STATUS, LICENSE_FILE, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ROLE_LAWYER', '정상', 'PENDING', #{licenseFile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
